title: borreria eryngioides var. affinis
intro: Borreria eryngioides var. affinis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Borreia plant. It is a medicinal herb that has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments to treat wounds and skin conditions.
